merge_notes.existing_quiz_status: Existing flat questions found in data/quiz/quiz_naeringsliv.json for ovre_foss: 5 questions. No separate set-file found.
merge_notes.kept: Kept useful core: Hjula textile/cotton production, Halvor Schou, 1855, women as main workforce, and office/culture reuse.
merge_notes.corrected: Expanded the target from only Hjula to the wider Øvre Foss industrial point: the fall itself, 24-foot fall height, Schultzehougen Finérsaug, Akers mekaniske Værksted, Hjulafossen, worker housing and industrial heritage.
merge_notes.not_continued: Did not continue flat 5-question structure. Did not use generic questions or em_by_ prefix.
merge_notes.added: Added 5 sets x 6 questions with source-first anchors: Øvre Foss, Hjulafossen, Sagveien 23, Beierbrua, Manchester looms, 600,000 metres of cotton fabric, 180 sample books, 112 shelf metres of archive, 800 employees, majority women, Labakkenfallene, 1957 closure, 1971 fire/1974 rebuilding and blue-plaque industrial heritage.

signature_features: Øvre Foss as the second lowest waterfall in Akerselva
Hjula Væverier at Sagveien 23 and Hjulafossen
large female workforce and textile archive
office/culture reuse and preserved industrial heritage
must_include: add Øvre Foss as actual waterfall/infrastructure context
avoid reducing target to one generic textile question
